cases.description: Basic case with one clearly most-frequent value
cases.expected_note: This is Microsoft's own documented MODE example data set -- https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/mode-function-e45192ce-9122-4980-82ed-4bdc34973120 -- 4 appears 3 times, more than any other value

cases.description: When every value in the data set is unique (no duplicates at all), MODE has nothing to return
cases.expected_note: Microsoft's MODE docs state verbatim: 'If the data set contains no duplicate data points, MODE returns the #N/A error value' -- https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/mode-function-e45192ce-9122-4980-82ed-4bdc34973120

cases.description: MODE works the same way on negative numbers
Text values and blank cells in the range are ignored when finding the mode
cases.expected_note: Only the numeric cells 1,1,2,3 participate; 1 is the most frequent among them
